// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;

namespace TestAssembly
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Extension methods for registering services from TestAssembly.
    /// </summary>
    public static class TestAssemblyServiceCollectionExtensions
    {
        /// <summary>
        /// Registers all default services.
        /// </summary>
        public static IServiceCollection AddTestAssembly(this IServiceCollection services)
        {
            services.AddSingleton(typeof(global::TestNamespace.GenericHandler<>), typeof(global::TestNamespace.GenericHandler<>));
            services.AddSingleton(typeof(global::TestNamespace.IHandler<>), typeof(global::TestNamespace.GenericHandler<>));
            services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.GenericHandler<global::TestNamespace.TestEntity>, global::TestNamespace.GenericHandler<global::TestNamespace.TestEntity>>();
            services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.IHandler<global::TestNamespace.TestEntity>, global::TestNamespace.GenericHandler<global::TestNamespace.TestEntity>>();

            return services;
        }
    }
}
